description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical pillar candle with a smooth, slightly uneven surface, suggesting it is made of solid wax. The candle is a pale, creamy beige color and sits atop a flat, octagonal golden base that appears to be metallic or painted metal. The top surface of the candle is flat with a small, centered wick visible, indicating it is unused or only lightly used. The wax body shows subtle shading and minor surface irregularities, giving it a realistic, hand-poured appearance. The base is thin and wide enough to provide stability, making it suitable for placement on flat surfaces. There are no visible wax drips or melted areas, and the candle is unlit.
description: A tall, cream-colored pillar candle with a smooth surface, set on a flat, octagonal golden base. The candle is unused, with a visible wick and no wax drips.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical candle with a flat top and centered wick, highlighting the octagonal golden base.
description_view_1: This side view reveals subtle surface irregularities in the wax and the full outline of the octagonal base.
description_view_2: Another side view with a smoother wax appearance and the golden base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Back view displays the candle's slightly uneven wax surface and the octagonal base from a different angle.
